Existing checkpoint 20260516-narada-architect-inquiry-space-mcp-relaunch-prep says full Inquiry Space machinery needs relaunch/rebind and possibly narada-andrey lift package routing.
payload.inquiry_pressure: The conversation reached a branch where Cloudflare hosted registry naming was doing ontology work. The missing structure appears to be an uber-chapter for Site Telemetry Publication: publisher Site, owning Site, telemetry event contract, projection store, remote candidate exchange, publication edge, local publisher/puller, hosted projection interface, and readiness operations.

Create or update the appropriate Site Telemetry Publication chapter/uber-chapter rather than forcing this directly into only SiteRegistry or Cloudflare deployment naming.
Clarify relation between Site Telemetry Publication, SiteRegistry, User Site awareness registry, hosted Cloudflare projection surfaces, and remote candidate exchange.
When Inquiry Space machinery exists, import or replay this envelope as an inquiry node/branch with evidence refs to this chat and the Cloudflare hosted Site Registry tasks 1377-1384.
payload.summary: During Cloudflare Site Registry naming/design discussion, operator and agent identified that the unease is not only URL naming or SiteRegistry. It exposes a broader missing Narada shape: Staccato-derived Site Telemetry Publication / Site Telemetry Surface, with SiteRegistry as a subchapter/read model.
payload.title: Record and lift Site Telemetry Publication inquiry branch
